member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IMarginSweepExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending FuseReadMarginsweep Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IMarginSweepExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IMarginSweepExtensions.CustomDatalogFuseStringByFuseGroupName(Prime.BusinessLogic.FuseLogicCollection.FuseRead.IFuseReadHandle)
member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize datalog fuse group.
member.param: Fuse read handle of the register.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod
member.summary: Test method responsible for executing FuseReadMarginSweep.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.FunctionalCaptureFailureEnabled
member.summary: Indicate functional to execute in CreateCaptureFailureAndCtvPerPinTest (true) or CreateCaptureCtvPerPinTest (false).

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.FunctionalCaptureFailureEnabled.True
member.summary: True/Enabled. Functional set will be in CreateCaptureFailureAndCtvPerPinTest mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.FunctionalCaptureFailureEnabled.False
member.summary: False/Disabled. Functional set will be in CreateCaptureCtvPerPinTest mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets ConfigurationFile. "~HDMT_TPL_DIR/Modules/FuseRead/FuseRead/InputFiles/fuseReadScenario1.json". other using type String.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.VoltageFile
member.summary: Gets or sets VoltageFile. "~HDMT_TPL_DIR/Modules/FuseRead/FuseRead/InputFiles/fuseReadVoltage.json". other using type String.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.ConfigName
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration name for the input file. Can only define single name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.RegisterName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of registers to select within the configuration. Can define single name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.ExecutionMode
member.summary: Gets or sets ExecutionMode. ExecutePattern - Using ctv data from pattern. Simulation Mode - Using simulation string. UsePreviousData - Using fuse read data from previous test executed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.EnableCaptureFunctionalFailure
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable CreateCaptureFailureAndCtvPerPinTest(true) or CreateCaptureCtvPerPinTest(false).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets patlist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets timing.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets level.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets preplist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.FuseGroupToDatalog
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of fuse group to datalog. When this parameter is defined (enabled) with valid fuse group name, the fuse string of the fuse group name will be datalog to ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.SharedStorageKeyToStore
member.summary: Gets or sets sharedstorage name to store fusestring.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.FuseReadConfigJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the FuseReadJsonFile file data contents.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.FuseReadVoltageConfigJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the FuseVoltageJsonFile file data contents.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.SetPinMask
member.summary: Set the list of pins that will be masked when plist is executed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.GetFunctionalTest(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Get functional test based on parameter EnableCaptureFunctionalFailure.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMarginSweepTestMethod.PrintFailureData
member.summary: Get per cycle failures and print to console.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults.FunctionalResult
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether functional execution passes or fails.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults.ExecuteFuseReadHandle
member.summary: Gets or sets FuseRead handle.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults.CtvResults
member.summary: Gets or sets CTV results.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults.UltDecodeReadHandle
member.summary: Gets or sets FuseRead handle.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults.CurrentExpectDieIdName
member.summary: Gets or sets Current Expect DieID Name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults.CurrentOffSetValue
member.summary: Gets or sets Current Ult OffSet Value.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending FuseReadMask Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions.CustomExecute(Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize execute mask.
member.param: Fuse read handle of the register.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions.ExecuteFailingMask(Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize execute failing mask.
member.param: Fuse read handle of the register.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions.ExecutePassingMask(Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize execute passing mask.
member.param: Fuse read handle of the register.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions.CustomDatalogFuseStringByFuseGroupName(Prime.BusinessLogic.FuseLogicCollection.FuseRead.IFuseReadHandle)
member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize datalog fuse group.
member.param: Fuse read handle of the register.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions.UltCustomExecute(Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize execute UltDecode.
member.param: Fuse read handle of the register.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions.PostUltCustomExecuteMask(Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize execute another mask after UltDecode.
member.param: Fuse read handle of the register.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod
member.summary: FuseRead TestMethod for ExecuteMask.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes
member.summary: Settings to enable or disable.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes.ENABLED
member.summary: Enable.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes.DISABLED
member.summary: Disable.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Pre Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets ConfigurationFile. "~HDMT_TPL_DIR/Modules/FuseRead/InputFiles/fuseReadConfig.json". other using type String.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.VoltageFile
member.summary: Gets or sets VoltageFile. "~HDMT_TPL_DIR/Modules/FuseRead/InputFiles/fuseReadVoltageConfig.json". other using type String.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.ConfigName
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration name for the input file. Can only define single name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.RegisterName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of registers to select within the configuration. Can define single or multiple name with comma delimiter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.SharedStorageKeyToStore
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated sharedstorage name to store fusestring per register. The number of SharedStorageKeyToStore must be match number of RegisterName.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.FailingMaskName
member.summary: Gets or sets the failing mask names. Can define single or multiple name with comma delimiter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.PassingMaskName
member.summary: Gets or sets the passing mask names. Can define single or multiple name with comma delimiter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.FuseGroupToDatalog
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of fuse group to datalog its fuse string to ituff. The fuse string is applied with FuseGroupsToHide.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.ExecutionMode
member.summary: Gets or sets ExecutionMode. ExecutePattern - Using ctv data from pattern. Simulation Mode - Using simulation string. UsePreviousData - Using fuse read data from previous test executed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.EnableCaptureFunctionalFailure
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable CreateCaptureFailureAndCtvPerPinTest(enabled) or CreateCaptureCtvPerPinTest(disabled).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.DieIdNames
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name Die Id name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.PackageEfuse
member.summary: Gets or sets DieId Name to print ituff as PackageEfuse. DieId ULT info will print under trlot, trwafer, trxloc, tryloc.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.PrintUltDataPerDieIdToItuff
member.summary: Gets or sets if the current instance has to print the ult data per die id to the ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.UltOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets list of offsets to start ctvs decoding. If one value is given it will be use as offsets for all Ctvs. Default is 0 (zero).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.PostUltExecuteMaskName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of masks to select within the register. Can define single or multiple name with comma delimiter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.FuseReadConfigJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the FuseReadJsonFile file data contents.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.FuseReadVoltageConfigJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the FuseVoltageJsonFile file data contents.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.Verify
member.summary: Verify FuseRead Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.Execute
member.summary: Execute Lot Start Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.SetPinMask
member.summary: Set the list of pins that will be masked when plist is executed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.UltDecoder(Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Basic Ult Decode functionality with all Ituff Print.
member.param: Fuse read handle of the register.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#FuseRead#IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions#ExecuteFailingMask(Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Execute failing mask(s). Pass when mismatch happen, otherwise fail and exit according to fail port assigned.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#FuseRead#IFuseReadMaskUltDecodeExtensions#ExecutePassingMask(Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Execute mask. Pass when no mismatch between mask value and ctv data, otherwise fail and exit according to fail port assigned.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecodeTestMethod.PrintFailureData
member.summary: Get per cycle failures and print to console.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.FuseReadMaskTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether functional execution passes or fails.

member.summary: Gets or sets FuseRead handle.

member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize execute mask.

member.summary: FuseRead TestMethod for ExecuteMask.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskTestMethod.FunctionalCaptureFailureEnabled
member.summary: Indicate functional to execute in CreateCaptureFailureAndCtvPerPinTest (true) or CreateCaptureCtvPerPinTest (false).

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskTestMethod.FunctionalCaptureFailureEnabled.True
member.summary: True/Enabled. Functional set will be in CreateCaptureFailureAndCtvPerPinTest mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadMaskTestMethod.FunctionalCaptureFailureEnabled.False
member.summary: False/Disabled. Functional set will be in CreateCaptureCtvPerPinTest mode.

member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.summary: Gets or sets ExecutionMode. ExecutePattern - Using ctv data from pattern. Simulation Mode - Using simulation string. UsePreviousData - Using fuse read data from previous test executed.

member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadSspecTestMethod.FuseGroupToDatalog
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of fuse group to datalog. When this parameter is defined (enabled) with valid fuse group name, the fuse string of the fuse group name will be datalog to ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadSspecTestMethod.FuseReadConfigJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the FuseReadJsonFile file data contents.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadSspecTestMethod.FuseReadVoltageConfigJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the FuseVoltageJsonFile file data contents.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadSspecTestMethod.Verify
member.summary: Verify FuseRead Sspec Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadSspecTestMethod.Execute
member.summary: Execute Lot Start Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadSspecTestMethod.SetPinMask
member.summary: Set the list of pins that will be masked when plist is executed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseRead.PrimeFuseReadSspecTestMethod.PrintFailureData
member.summary: Get per cycle failures and print to console.
